tools.Name: The AI Scientist-v2
tools.Description: A fully autonomous agentic system that generates research hypotheses, conducts experiments, analyzes data, and writes scientific papers.
tools.Use_Case: Automating end-to-end scientific research and manuscript drafting for Machine Learning domains.

tools.Name: Strix
tools.Description: An autonomous AI agent platform designed to perform penetration testing, vulnerability discovery, and automated exploit validation.
tools.Use_Case: Detecting vulnerabilities in applications, performing rapid security assessments, and integrating automated pen-testing into CI/CD pipelines.

tools.Name: Chandra OCR 2
tools.Description: A state-of-the-art OCR model optimized for complex document layouts, including tables, handwriting, math equations, and forms.
tools.Use_Case: Extracting structured data from complex, multi-lingual scanned documents and images into Markdown, JSON, or HTML.
